---
title: "DeepFlow"
subtitle: "Science beneath the surface"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:inline-block; font-size:18px; padding:4px 16px;
    border-radius:999px; background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
    color:#4B5563; margin-bottom:16px; letter-spacing:0.08em;">
    SCIENCE · CODE · INSIGHT · WATER
  </div>
  <div style="width:48px; height:3px; background:#8B5CF6;
    margin:0 auto 20px; border-radius:2px;"></div>
  <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; justify-content:center;">
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">Groundwater</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">Geochemistry</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">Hydrology</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">AI & Python</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">MODFLOW</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">PHREEQC</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">地理学</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;">温泉の科学</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(217,119,6,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);
      color:#4B5563;"><strong>水</strong></span>
  </div>
</div>
```

<strong>環境問題や水資源</strong>の評価に役立つ地下水・地球化学解析（<strong>MODFLOW, PHREEQC</strong>）と、<strong>Python・AI</strong>を用いたデータ分析のノウハウを共有します。

科学・コード・多様な観点で、水の世界を探求し、**「データから自然現象を読み解く」**サイトです。

**・Blog** : MODFLOW・PHREEQC・Pythonで、**水**の謎をコードで解く。数式と実装の世界へ。

**・温泉・地理** : 温泉の成分と源を科学する。地理と地球化学で、泉質の秘密を読み解く。

**・Apps** : 地球化学計算や分子量計算など、研究にちょいと必要なツール。

------------------------------------------------------------------------
